hooks.command: root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; st=$(git status --porcelain); if [ -z "$st" ]; then exit 0; fi; n=$(printf '%s\n' "$st" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); first=$(printf '%s\n' "$st" | head -1 | awk '{print $NF}' | awk -F/ '{print $NF}'); if [ "$n" = "1" ]; then subject="auto: update $first"; else subject="auto: update $first and $((n-1)) more"; fi; git add -A && git commit -m "$subject" -m "$st" >/dev/null 2>&1 && (git push 2>/dev/null || true); exit 0
